name: Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng - Dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay miễn phí (Wyndham Soleil Danang - Free Schedule Airport Shuttle)
address: 194 VO NGUYEN GIAP, Phước Mỹ, Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam
description:
Khám Phá Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng - Trải Nghiệm Nghỉ Dưỡng Đẳng Cấp Với Dịch Vụ Chuyển Đổi Sân Bay Miễn Phí

Nằm cách trung tâm thành phố Đà Nẵng chỉ 2 km và chỉ mất khoảng 15 phút di chuyển đến sân bay, Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng là điểm đến lý tưởng cho du khách mong muốn kết hợp giữa tiện nghi hiện đại và sự thuận tiện tối đa. Khách sạn mới xây dựng vào năm 2025 này tự hào sở hữu 882 phòng nghỉ sang trọng, rộng rãi, mang đến không gian lý tưởng để thư giãn sau những ngày khám phá thành phố năng động này.

Với chính sách linh hoạt dành cho trẻ em từ 3 đến 5 tuổi, Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho gia đình có trẻ nhỏ. Quý khách có thể nhận phòng từ 14:00 và trả phòng trước 12:00 trưa, đảm bảo thời gian nghỉ ngơi hợp lý. Đặc biệt, dịch vụ chuyển đổi sân bay miễn phí hai chiều giúp hành trình của bạn trở nên dễ dàng hơn bao giờ hết, mang đến trải nghiệm lưu trú thoải mái, tiện nghi và trọn vẹn tại thành phố biển xinh đẹp này.

Tiện Nghi Giải Trí Đẳng Cấp Tại Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng

Đối với những ai yêu thích không gian sôi động về đêm, khách sạn còn có câu lạc bộ đêm (nightclub) để thỏa mãn đam mê âm nhạc và nhảy múa cùng bạn bè. Sau những ngày dài khám phá, hãy thư giãn tại phòng xông hơi (sauna) hiện đại, giúp giải tỏa căng thẳng và làm mới năng lượng. Bên cạnh đó, khu vườn xinh đẹp xung quanh khách sạn mang đến không gian yên bình, lý tưởng để thưởng thức không khí trong lành và tận hưởng những phút giây thư thái bên gia đình hoặc bạn bè.

Tiện Nghi Thể Thao Đẳng Cấp Tại Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng

Tại Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng, du khách không chỉ được tận hưởng không gian nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng mà còn có cơ hội trải nghiệm các tiện nghi thể thao đẳng cấp. Trung tâm thể hình miễn phí của khách sạn được trang bị đầy đủ thiết bị hiện đại, giúp bạn duy trì phong độ và rèn luyện sức khỏe trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Ngoài ra, hồ bơi ngoài trời rộng lớn là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn, tắm nắng và đắm mình trong làn nước mát lạnh, mang lại cảm giác sảng khoái sau những ngày khám phá thành phố. Quầy bar cạnh hồ bơi còn phục vụ các loại đồ uống hấp dẫn, tạo không khí vui vẻ và thân thiện cho du khách.

Không chỉ có vậy, Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng còn sở hữu bãi biển riêng tuyệt đẹp, nơi bạn có thể thoải mái tắm biển, chơi các hoạt động ngoài trời hoặc thư giãn trên cát trắng mịn. Với các tiện nghi thể thao đa dạng và không gian mở rộng, khách sạn cam kết mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo, kết hợp giữa thể thao, thư giãn và giải trí trong một khung cảnh thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp của Đà Nẵng.

Tiện Nghi Tiện Lợi Tại Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng

Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng mang đến cho khách hàng trải nghiệm tiện nghi vượt trội với các dịch vụ đa dạng như dịch vụ giặt là, giặt khô và lưu giữ hành lý an toàn, giúp du khách yên tâm trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình. Phòng nghỉ được trang bị Wi-Fi miễn phí, kết nối nhanh chóng và ổn định, đồng thời khách còn có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ phòng 24/7 để đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu. Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể truy cập vào phòng chờ cao cấp, nơi cung cấp không gian thư giãn sang trọng cùng các tiện ích đặc biệt, hoặc sử dụng các dịch vụ tiện ích như tủ an toàn, quầy lưu trữ hành lý và cửa hàng tiện lợi ngay trong khuôn viên khách sạn. Với khu vực hút thuốc riêng biệt và dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng cam kết mang đến trải nghiệm thoải mái, an toàn và tiện lợi cho mọi khách hàng.

Tiện Nghi Giao Thông Đẳng Cấp Tại Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng

Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng tự hào mang đến dịch vụ vận chuyển tiện lợi và thoải mái cho khách lưu trú, trong đó nổi bật là dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay miễn phí hai chiều, giúp quý khách dễ dàng di chuyển từ và đến sân bay mà không lo lắng về phương tiện. Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể tận dụng dịch vụ tour du lịch đa dạng hoặc sử dụng dịch vụ taxi thuận tiện để khám phá thành phố Đà Nẵng một cách linh hoạt và an toàn.

Khách sạn còn cung cấp các tiện ích về đỗ xe như bãi đỗ xe trong khuôn viên, tự do đỗ xe hoặc dịch vụ đỗ xe miễn phí cho khách, giúp quý khách yên tâm về phương tiện của mình trong suốt thời gian lưu trú. Đối với những khách có nhu cầu sử dụng dịch vụ vận chuyển nội bộ hoặc đi lại trong thành phố, Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng luôn sẵn sàng phục vụ với các dịch vụ shuttle tiện lợi, đảm bảo mọi hành trình của khách đều suôn sẻ và thuận tiện.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Sang Trọng tại Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng

Khách sạn Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng mang đến không gian nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp với các tiện nghi hiện đại và tiện ích cao cấp. Phòng nghỉ được trang bị đầy đủ các đồ dùng như áo choàng tắm, máy sấy tóc, và các loại toiletries để đảm bảo sự thoải mái tối đa cho khách. Mỗi phòng còn có truyền hình vệ tinh/cáp và tivi, giúp bạn thư giãn và cập nhật những tin tức mới nhất. Bên cạnh đó, minibar, tủ lạnh và máy pha cà phê/trà đều sẵn sàng phục vụ nhu cầu cá nhân của bạn, cùng với nước khoáng miễn phí để bạn luôn cảm thấy sảng khoái.

Không gian phòng còn nổi bật với ban công hoặc sân thượng, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức không khí trong lành của Đà Nẵng. Các rèm cửa chống tối giúp tạo không gian yên tĩnh, lý tưởng để nghỉ ngơi sau một ngày dài. Ngoài ra, phòng còn có phòng khách riêng biệt, mang lại cảm giác rộng rãi và riêng tư, phù hợp cho các gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn. Các tiện ích như khăn tắm, bộ linens cao cấp cùng các đồ dùng cá nhân sẽ làm hài lòng mọi khách hàng khó tính nhất.

Trải Nghiệm Ẩm Thực Đẳng Cấp Tại Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng

Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng mang đến cho khách hàng trải nghiệm ẩm thực phong phú và đa dạng ngay trong khuôn viên khách sạn. Quý khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon miệng tại nhà hàng sang trọng, nơi phục vụ các món ăn đa dạng phù hợp với khẩu vị của mọi thực khách. Ngoài ra, dịch vụ phòng 24/7 cho phép bạn thưởng thức những món ăn yêu thích ngay tại phòng riêng, mang lại sự tiện lợi và thoải mái tối đa trong suối ngày bận rộn.

Đối với những buổi sáng bắt đầu tràn đầy năng lượng, Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng cung cấp buffet sáng phong phú cùng với lựa chọn breakfast kiểu châu Âu (continental breakfast), giúp khách hàng có thể lựa chọn theo sở thích. Thêm vào đó, quán cà phê trong khuôn viên khách sạn là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn, thưởng thức ly cà phê thơm ngon sau một ngày khám phá thành phố. Dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày đảm bảo không gian nghỉ dưỡng luôn sạch sẽ, thoáng mát để bạn có thể tận hưởng trọn vẹn kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Các Loại Phòng Đa Dạng Tại Wyndham Soleil Danang - Miễn Phí Di Chuyển Sân Bay Hai Chiều

Tại Wyndham Soleil Danang, du khách có thể lựa chọn từ nhiều loại phòng đa dạng phù hợp với nhu cầu và sở thích của mình. Các loại phòng như 1 Bedroom Family Suite với Ban Công và View Thành Phố, hoặc các căn 1 Bedroom Family Suite với Ban Công và View Biển Một phần, mang đến không gian rộng rãi và thoải mái cho gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn. Ngoài ra, các căn Deluxe Family Suite với Ban Công và View Thành Phố hoặc Biển Một phần, cùng các phòng Studio Deluxe với Ban Công và View Thành Phố, Biển hoặc Một phần, đều mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp trong không gian tiện nghi, rộng rãi từ 34 đến 86 mét vuông. Đặc biệt, các căn 2 phòng ngủ như Deluxe Family Suite hoặc Family Suite với Ban Công và View Biển, đều phù hợp cho nhóm lớn hoặc gia đình muốn tận hưởng không gian riêng tư, thoải mái. Đối với những nhóm lớn hơn, các căn Grand Suite hoặc Duplex 3 Phòng Ngủ với View Toàn Cảnh Đại Dương, đều mang đến không gian rộng tới 100 mét vuông, lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng khung cảnh biển tuyệt đẹp.

Khám Phá Phước Mỹ - Khu Vực Sôi Động và Đầy Năng Động của Đà Nẵng

Phước Mỹ là một trong những khu vực nổi bật và sôi động nhất của thành phố Đà Nẵng, nổi bật với bầu không khí trẻ trung, năng động và đầy sức sống. Nơi đây không chỉ là trung tâm của các hoạt động giải trí, mua sắm mà còn là điểm đến lý tưởng để trải nghiệm ẩm thực đa dạng từ các quán ăn địa phương đến nhà hàng cao cấp. Phước Mỹ còn nổi tiếng với các bãi biển dài, cát trắng mịn và là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn, tắm nắng hoặc tham gia các hoạt động thể thao nước hấp dẫn. Khi đến đây, du khách còn có cơ hội khám phá các quán cà phê độc đáo, các chợ đêm sầm uất và các trung tâm mua sắm hiện đại, mang lại trải nghiệm trọn vẹn về cuộc sống năng động của thành phố biển Đà Nẵng.

Hướng Dẫn Di Chuyển Từ Sân Bay Đà Nẵng Đến Wyndham Soleil Danang - Miễn Phí Xe Đưa Đón Hai Chiều

Từ sân bay quốc tế Đà Nẵng, du khách chỉ mất khoảng 15-20 phút di chuyển bằng xe hơi để đến Wyndham Soleil Danang, một trong những khách sạn sang trọng và tiện nghi nhất tại Phước Mỹ. Khi vừa rời khỏi khu vực kiểm tra an ninh, bạn có thể dễ dàng thuê xe taxi hoặc dịch vụ đưa đón riêng để đến khách sạn một cách nhanh chóng và thuận tiện. Ngoài ra, nhiều dịch vụ xe đưa đón của khách sạn cũng có sẵn để hỗ trợ khách hàng, giúp bạn không cần lo lắng về việc di chuyển hay tìm đường trong thành phố.

Điều đặc biệt, Wyndham Soleil Danang cung cấp dịch vụ chuyển tiếp miễn phí hai chiều, đảm bảo sự thoải mái và an toàn cho khách hàng từ sân bay đến khách sạn và ngược lại. Khi đặt phòng, bạn chỉ cần thông báo về giờ đến của mình, và đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện sẽ sắp xếp xe đưa đón đúng giờ, giúp bạn bắt đầu kỳ nghỉ của mình một cách dễ dàng và thuận tiện nhất. Với dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp và tiện ích này, hành trình từ sân bay đến khách sạn trở nên đơn giản, nhanh chóng và không gây phiền hà, mang lại trải nghiệm du lịch trọn vẹn và thoải mái cho mọi khách lưu trú tại Wyndham Soleil Danang.

Khám Phá Các Địa Danh Nổi Tiếng Gần Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng

Nằm ở trung tâm thành phố Đà Nẵng, Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng mang đến cho du khách cơ hội dễ dàng khám phá những điểm đến nổi bật xung quanh. Chỉ cách đó không xa là Cầu Rồng - biểu tượng kiến trúc độc đáo của thành phố, nổi bật với hình dáng con rồng khổng lồ phun lửa và phun nước vào các dịp đặc biệt. Bên cạnh đó, bãi biển Mỹ Khê tuyệt đẹp với cát trắng mịn và làn nước trong xanh mời gọi du khách tham gia các hoạt động thể thao nước hoặc thư giãn dưới ánh nắng vàng rực rỡ.
Không chỉ dừng lại ở đó, du khách còn có thể ghé thăm Bảo Tàng 3D Đà Nẵng Art in Paradise để thưởng thức các tác phẩm nghệ thuật 3D sống động, hay dạo chơi tại Bến du thuyền DHC để trải nghiệm không khí sôi động của thành phố về đêm. Các địa điểm này tạo nên một hành trình khám phá đa dạng, giúp du khách tận hưởng trọn vẹn vẻ đẹp và văn hóa của Đà Nẵng ngay từ khi lưu trú tại Wyndham Soleil.

Các nhà hàng xung quanh Wyndham Soleil Danang - Free Two Ways Airport Transfer

Khu vực xung quanh Wyndham Soleil Danang nổi bật với đa dạng các lựa chọn ẩm thực phong phú. Du khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đặc trưng tại Bikini Bottom Express hoặc trải nghiệm ẩm thực Ý đậm đà tại L'Italiano Restaurant Danang. Đối với những ai yêu thích hương vị Ấn Độ, Gujarat Indian Restaurant và Nhà hàng gia đình Ấn Độ là những điểm đến lý tưởng. Ngoài ra, Esco Beach Bar Lounge & Restaurant mang đến không gian thư giãn bên bờ biển, trong khi Phuoc Thai Restaurant và 4U Beach Restaurant phục vụ các món hải sản tươi ngon. Các quán cà phê như Happy Heart Cafe cũng là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức đồ uống và thư giãn sau một ngày dài khám phá thành phố. Veteran Restaurant và My Casa mang đến những trải nghiệm ẩm thực đa dạng, đảm bảo đáp ứng mọi khẩu vị của du khách.

Các địa danh mua sắm nổi bật quanh Wyndham Soleil Danang

Khách lưu trú tại Wyndham Soleil Danang có cơ hội khám phá nhiều điểm mua sắm hấp dẫn trong khu vực. Bạn có thể ghé thăm Cơ Sở Điêu Khắc Đá Mỹ nghệ Lợi Tài và Dũng Tuyết để tìm hiểu và sở hữu những tác phẩm điêu khắc đá thủ công tinh xảo. Phòng tranh OASIS là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức nghệ thuật đương đại và mua sắm các tác phẩm tranh độc đáo. Đối với các trung tâm thương mại lớn, Vincom Plaza mang đến trải nghiệm mua sắm đa dạng từ thời trang, điện tử đến ẩm thực. Chợ đêm Đà Nẵng, Chợ đêm Sơn Trà và Chợ Bắc Mỹ An là những điểm đến không thể bỏ qua để thưởng thức đặc sản và mua sắm các mặt hàng truyền thống. Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể ghé qua Cửa hàng StormX để khám phá các sản phẩm thời trang và phụ kiện phong cách. Tất cả những địa danh này đều dễ dàng tiếp cận, mang đến trải nghiệm mua sắm phong phú và đa dạng cho du khách trong hành trình khám phá Đà Nẵng.

Giá Phòng Tại Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng - Ưu Đãi Đặc Biệt Với Dịch Vụ Đưa Đón Sân Bay Miễn Phí

Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm lưu trú đẳng cấp với mức giá phòng trung bình từ 51 đến 75 USD, phù hợp với tiêu chuẩn cao cấp của khách sạn quốc tế. Điều đặc biệt là khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay hai chiều miễn phí, giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và chi phí di chuyển, đồng thời tạo cảm giác thoải mái ngay từ khi đặt chân đến thành phố biển xinh đẹp này.

So sánh với mức giá trung bình của các khách sạn khác tại Đà Nẵng, cũng dao động trong khoảng 51 đến 75 USD, Wyndham Soleil nổi bật với dịch vụ miễn phí và tiện nghi cao cấp, mang lại giá trị vượt mong đợi cho khách hàng. Đây là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ đẳng cấp mà vẫn tiết kiệm được chi phí di chuyển, đồng thời khám phá vẻ đẹp của thành phố Đà Nẵng một cách thuận tiện và thoải mái.

Đánh giá tích cực về Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng - Dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay miễn phí hai chiều

Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng ghi điểm mạnh mẽ với khách hàng nhờ vị trí đắc địa, thuận tiện để khám phá thành phố biển xinh đẹp này. Khách lưu trú đánh giá cao khả năng cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay miễn phí hai chiều, giúp hành trình của họ trở nên dễ dàng và thoải mái từ phút đầu tiên đến cuối cùng. Các tiện nghi tại khách sạn được thiết kế hiện đại, sạch sẽ và tiện nghi, đáp ứng tốt mọi nhu cầu của du khách, từ nghỉ dưỡng cho đến công tác.

Bên cạnh đó, đội ngũ nhân viên tại Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng thể hiện sự chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện và tận tâm, luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ khách hàng một cách chu đáo nhất. Mức giá trị mà khách sạn mang lại khá hợp lý, phù hợp với những ai muốn trải nghiệm đẳng cấp mà vẫn tiết kiệm chi phí. Với các tiện ích nổi bật cùng dịch vụ khách hàng tận tình, Wyndham Soleil Đà Nẵng là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn có một kỳ nghỉ thoả mãn tại Đà Nẵng.

The staff confirmed that I had booked an ocean view room, yet they assigned me Room 1601. The bed was uncomfortably hard and affected the quality of sleep.

sample_comments.title: Terrible Hotel
sample_comments.text: Had booked extra bed but hotel had not put in room and took from 11 pm to 2 am to put extra bed in the room. Second day I upgraded room because my son wanted tub bath. In evening when we can came they allocated room without bathtub. Also there were cockroaches in bathroom
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Vinitkumar,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us.

We are deeply sorry to hear about the inconveniences you faced during your stay. Please accept our sincerest apologies for the delay in providing the extra bed and for the room allocation not meeting your expectations, especially after your upgrade request. Additionally, we truly regret the unacceptable cleanliness issue you encountered in the bathroom.

Your feedback has been brought to the immediate attention of our management and relevant departments to ensure that such incidents are thoroughly investigated and prevented in the future. What you experienced falls far below the standards we strive to uphold.

We genuinely appreciate your feedback, and while we cannot change your recent experience, we hope to have the opportunity to restore your trust in a future stay.

Warm regards,
Wyndham Soleil Danang

sample_comments.negatives: I dont - mosquitos even in breakfast area

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text:
Terrible service and disappointing room. I booked an ocean view room with a balcony, but it was barely a partial view. The room itself was dark and humid.

Regarding service, the cleaning staff arrived very early, so I used the 'Do Not Disturb' sign. When I left for the day, I explicitly asked reception to clean the room while I was out for a few hours. Even though I returned late, nothing had been done. When I complained, the staff seemed completely indifferent and offered no apology.

To make matters worse, they tried to charge me for the minibar even though I hadn't touched anything. Tip for travelers: Double-check your minibar at check-in, or they might overcharge you. The front desk even had the nerve to ask 'how was your stay' during checkout after ignoring my previous complaints. They clearly need to be retrained on basic hospitality and manners.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Studio, 1 King Bed, with Balcony and Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Old and tired, not super friendly and over priced for what you get.
sample_comments.positives: The kids area was nice
sample_comments.negatives: Check in took 1.5 hours with two small kids, it felt like we were staying a deserted hotel as there was no one else on the floor we were on which was creepy feeling. It felt old and a bit run down, and not very friendly. I would highly recommend looking elsewhere.

sample_comments.title: Dirtiest and most poorly maintained hotel ever
sample_comments.text:
This 5-star hotel is even dirtier than any 3-star hotels or student hostels I have ever seen. Many surfaces in the room were not just dusty, but visibly dirty (brown stick stains) and greasy to the touch. 

The staff at the reception did not even bother to look at me when I was speaking with him. 

The final straw was that despite this being a relatively new hotel, the door to the balcony was faulty and could not be fully closed.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Studio, 1 King Bed, with Balcony and Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: The location was good however there were terrible EDM music blasting on the beach everyday from 7pm-10pm. It is honestly not acceptable. The hotel use single-plane window hence people will hear all sorts of noise directly from the street without filter. The windows and frames are NOT WELL SEALED.
sample_comments.negatives:
THIS IS A FRANCHISE OF WYNDHAM, IT'S NOT A WYNDHAM HOTEL. We got confused and think this hotel belong to Wyndham but it is technically not the case. This is a local hotel with a service and facility like a *3-star hotel*. The information on Booking.com is misleading. 
Staff seemed to be friendly however dishonest. The manager pretended to not understand the issue of the windows (i.e. single-pane thin glass). The housekeeping staff were unprofessional. It is absurd to run a hotel without any hospitality management skills.

sample_comments.title: Down feather bedding with no alternatives for those allergic!
sample_comments.text: The bedding, mattress pad and pillows are all down feathers. I'm allergic and all they offered was to remove the bedding and replace my pillows with towels in a pillow case. Shameful Wyndham. I have never in my many years of travel experienced such disregard for customer health and well being.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for bringing this matter to our attention. We sincerely apologize for the discomfort and frustration you experienced regarding the bedding during your stay. We fully understand how serious allergies can be, and we regret that we were unable to provide a suitable alternative at the time.

Your feedback regarding the lack of non-feather bedding options has been taken very seriously and shared with our management team for immediate review. Guest health, comfort, and well-being are extremely important to us, and we truly regret that we did not meet your expectations in this instance.

We appreciate you sharing your experience, as it helps us identify critical areas for improvement. We hope there may be an opportunity in the future to regain your trust and provide you with a more comfortable and accommodating stay.
Regards,
Wyndham Soleil Danang
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Studio, 1 King Bed, with Balcony and Partial Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Wasted time and wasted money unhappy stay
sample_comments.positives: The location, nice staff members
sample_comments.negatives:
The dirty showered room, no ironing board, dirty floor, "standard room" size is very far from "standard"
Crowded loud tourists, complimentary breakfast quality is under average, HOT lobby in busy hours...

sample_comments.title: Happy to leave early
sample_comments.text:
We stayed at Wyndham Soleil Da Nang and were scheduled for 4 nights but checked out after only 2 due to multiple issues.

Positives:
 • Breakfast was solid with a good selection
 • Initial impression of the staff was positive
 • Air conditioning worked extremely well

Negatives:
 • The room was very small
 • The room was advertised as a studio with a kitchen, yet guests are not allowed to use the kitchen, which makes no sense
 • Several lights in the room did not work
 • Basic items like the clock and bathroom scales were unusable due to missing batteries
 • The pool was extremely cold
 • Ongoing construction was happening in and around the pool area, with saws and other tools being used during the day, making it unpleasant and unsafe

Location:
The hotel is surrounded by construction sites. Noise was constant throughout the day, which made it difficult to relax or rest.

Because of these issues, we chose to leave early. At checkout, the duty manager, Lam, offered an alternative room and a complimentary dinner, but by that stage we were already resigned to leaving. She advised that a refund would need to be requested via the booking agent and assured us that when it reached the hotel's online team, she would ensure it was approved.

Unfortunately, this did not happen. Only 10% of the cost for the final two nights was refunded, despite the cancellation policy stating a 25% charge. When I contacted the hotel again, management stated they had no influence over refunds, directly contradicting what we were told at checkout.

Overall, the experience was disappointing and poorly handled. Due to the room issues, construction noise, unfinished facilities, and lack of follow-through on refund commitments, I would not recommend staying at this hotel.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback with us. We sincerely regret to learn that your stay did not meet your expectations and that you chose to depart earlier than planned due to the issues you experienced.

While we are pleased to know that you appreciated our breakfast selection, the initial service from our team, and the effectiveness of the air conditioning, we are truly sorry for the shortcomings related to the room size, in-room facilities, maintenance issues, pool temperature, and the construction activities in and around the pool area. We also apologize for the confusion regarding the kitchen facilities and for the inconvenience caused by non-functioning lights and items due to missing batteries.

Your comments have been shared with our management and relevant departments for immediate review and corrective action. We value your honest feedback, as it helps us identify areas that require urgent improvement to enhance the overall guest
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Studio, 1 King Bed, with Balcony and Partial Ocean View

sample_comments.title: The worst Wyndham property I've ever stayed in years. Buffet is decent but service is subpar.
sample_comments.positives: Proximity to the beach and the view
sample_comments.negatives:
1. Staff- lazy, lacks customer service training, wouldn't even greet people (customers or not) coming into the lobby. Was there for 4 days and wasn't greeted ever! 3-4 staff at the front desk wouldn't even establish eye contact. They were either on their phone or screens. 

2. Staff- would take the liberty of using their master key to open your door even after 10:00pm. Happened more than once during my stay. 

3. Tiny rooms, construction next door wasn't giving the chill vibes

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: It was so loud and the WiFi is nonexistent. At night you will easily be able to hear the commotion down at the street, and we were on the 9th floor. I wouldn't recommend it for the price
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms Jesse,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We sincerely apologize for the noise you experienced and for the issues with WiFi during your stay. We understand how this could affect your overall experience, and your comments are valuable for us to improve both our services and guest comfort. We regret that your stay did not meet expectations and hope for the opportunity to provide a better experience in the future.

Regards,
Wyndham Soleil Danang
sample_comments.room_type: Family Suite, 1 Bedroom, with Balcony and City View

sample_comments.title: Still not much improvement
sample_comments.positives:
- Location
- Spacious 2-bedroom with large balcony. Suitable for family
- The kids club is opened now, which is very useful on rainy days
- The staffs are generally nice, smiling, helpful
sample_comments.negatives:
Compared to my first trip 3 months ago:
- Still very poor buffet, still no seafood (no fishes, no shrimps, no crabs, no octopus, nothing...) which is really bizarre given we are right next to the beach
- Housekeeping still too quick, not clean enough
- Charge for water bottles. It's a 5-star hotel, we already pay a lot. Most other 5-star hotels/resorts that I stayed in provide unlimited water.

The last time I stayed here, there were many problems, but at least the hotel was just opened, so I gave it another chance. 3 months later, still not much improvements. Way too overpriced for the poor service provided.

sample_comments.title: The hotel is not finished yet.
sample_comments.text: Very dirty and not attentive.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Thái,

Thank you for your feedback.

We sincerely apologize that your experience did not meet your expectations. We are currently in the final stages of completing certain areas of the hotel, and we regret any inconvenience this may have caused. Your comments regarding cleanliness and service have been noted and shared with the relevant teams for immediate improvement.

We truly appreciate your input, as it helps us to enhance our guest experience. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future under better conditions.

Warm regards,
Wyndham Soleil Danang
sample_comments.room_type: Family Suite, 1 Bedroom, with Balcony and City View

sample_comments.title: Cleanliness need to be improve
sample_comments.positives: greats location, it near the beach and the center that easy to explore Da Nang and enjoy the beach. the new hotel, everything new
sample_comments.negatives:
My mom didn't sleep well on the first night because she felt itchy when lying on the bed. She complained to the manager, but at first they blamed it on a possible food allergy, which was not true. After several arguments, the manager finally agreed to change the room. After moving, everything was fine, but unfortunately my mom still keeps an unpleasant memory of this hotel, mostly because of how the situation was handled.

The buffet breakfast was also disappointing ,not much variety, definitely not up to the standard of a 5-star hotel. I have stayed in many hotels and resorts in Vietnam, so I know what the 5-star standard usually looks like.

Another confusing point is that on Google this hotel appears as a 3-star property, but here on this platform it is shown as 5-star. This should really be clarified to avoid misleading guests.

Overall, some things were okay after the room change, but the first impression and these issues left us questioning the true standard of this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
I am currently staying at your hotel for a family vacation, and I am extremely disappointed with the level of service. Despite requesting a high-floor room months in advance to avoid street noise, we were assigned a lower floor. As a result, the noise level has made it impossible for my family to sleep. 
Furthermore, the reception staff has been unprofessional and uncooperative. We are a family of four, yet we were only provided two key cards. When we requested additional keys---essential for accessing our floor via the elevator---the staff was visibly irritated and insisted we share. This has caused significant daily inconvenience, forcing us to constantly coordinate elevator trips just to enter our room. 
This experience is far below the standards I expect from the Wyndham brand. Because of these unresolved issues, I intend to cancel my second upcoming reservation at this property. There are much better hotels in the area.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for sharing your concerns.

We sincerely apologize that your stay has not met expectations, particularly regarding the room assignment, noise disturbance, and the inconvenience with key cards. We are also very sorry to hear about your experience with our reception service, which does not reflect our service standards.

Your feedback has been shared with management for immediate attention. We regret the impact this has had on your plans and appreciate you bringing these matters to our attention.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Suite, 2 Bedrooms, with Balcony and Ocean View (Family)

sample_comments.title: Won't be coming again
sample_comments.negatives:
Attention to details and requests made in advance.
Hotel is quiet new, booked it for its name but was utterly disappointed.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
This was a very disappointing stay. The receptionist staff were not professional, which already gave a poor first impression.

I booked two rooms. My parents' room had an extra bed set up even though we did not request it. My own room was not properly cleaned, as I found dust and debris inside.

Before going out for dinner, I asked the staff to update the key card so it could access both rooms. However, when I returned, the card did not work and I had to ask another staff member to fix it.

Overall, this experience did not meet basic expectations in terms of service, cleanliness, and attention to detail. I hope the hotel improves these issues for future guests.

sample_comments.title: Chosen for location because of Marathon
sample_comments.text:
This hotel doesn't feel like it is value for money. We paid SGD *** for 4 nights which is SGD ***/night. The fixtures look run down even though the hotel is newly opened.

The only reason we chose was because of its location. We came to Danang for the marathon. 

 The cleanliness is very questionable. Upon check in, the floor feels slightly sticky, not freshly mopped. (Perhaps their mop is dirty). I also found some dust and hair strands upon check in. 

Breakfast spread was really good though. But the seating layout is a bit odd, and a little inconvenient for some guests. 

We were away from our room since 9am, and the room wasn't cleaned until 4:00pm. The housekeeping crew came only when I called the reception. The reception explained that they cleaned starting from the top floors. I saw some housekeeping crew leaving level 4 in the morning though. It would have been really inefficient to be going floor by floor without having an assigned crew per floor. 

I don't think I would either recommend or come back to this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Great Family Stay with Breathtaking Views. Few improvements needed
sample_comments.positives: The view of the beach from the 16th floor was absolutely breathtaking. We loved the layout, especially the wraparound balcony that is accessible from every room, including the kitchen. The pool looked fantastic, though the weather didn't cooperate during our stay. The kids' zone was a hit, and the breakfast options were satisfying. A special mention goes to the staff---the reception team was incredibly helpful with arranging taxis, providing umbrellas, and attending to the children. The welcome cake was a delightful bonus!
sample_comments.negatives: Overall, we had a great stay, though there is some room for improvement regarding housekeeping. We noticed certain areas of the room were not thoroughly cleaned, and our sheets were not changed on a day when they were visibly soiled. Additionally, we would have loved to see more continental options at breakfast and extended hours until 11:00 or 11:30 AM.

sample_comments.title: Consider carefully before moving in.
sample_comments.text:
Praise-worthy aspects:
The hotel is clean, the room facilities are acceptable, the staff are very enthusiastic in helping guests, the breakfast area is spacious, there is a good variety of food, and the location is great.
Disadvantages and areas for improvement:
There were too many people during breakfast, I don't know if it's due to the peak season, but personally, I felt there was a shortage of staff, table clearing was very slow, and cleaning needs improvement.
I booked a sea view two-bedroom suite with a kitchen and living room, but when I inquired at the front desk, they said this is the sea view suite. The kitchen facilities only included an electric kettle and a refrigerator, cooking was not possible, and there was no microwave. The room area is small, and there's no space to open my luggage. The main suite was acceptable, but it didn't even have the most basic desk. The bathroom design of the suite is the worst, lacking a separate wet and dry shower area, requiring one to stand in the bathtub while showering, which is very slippery, and there is no barrier to prevent water from splashing. After each shower, the entire floor gets soaked, which is very annoying as I have to clean it myself. The guest bathroom's shower screen door even pushes outward; I've never seen that before.
Some front desk staff need further training. The normal check-in time is 14:00, and check-out is 12:00. On the day of check-in, I could only access the room an hour late, which I accepted. The next day, when I tried to request a late check-out, the staff kindly told me they couldn't accommodate my request due to full occupancy, which I also accepted. However, on the day of my check-out at 11:30, the room phone rang, and they told me I needed to check out. I replied that it wasn't time yet, and they immediately hung up. At 11:45, the phone rang again, and I ignored it.
I have never experienced such service at a five-star hotel; this hotel caters to too many tour groups. I stayed for 5 nights, and the lobby was very noisy every time I came in and out. This hotel is at most a 3-4 star.

sample_comments.negatives: For some reason they did not have hot water. The water was set hotel wide at 34C. I couldn't even take a shower. We complained 3 times before they raised it to 40C which at least I could shower in. Hotel industry sets it at 50C which is where they should be at.

sample_comments.title: Good location,beautiful view
sample_comments.text: Good view

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: The staff was great they were very helpful, the location is fantastic 2 min to the beach ,the rooms are clean .
sample_comments.negatives: The street noise is really bad, especially at night , the restaurant needs to take orders from the phone, not on my door

sample_comments.title: 2-bedroom seaside view corner apartment
sample_comments.text:
The room has a beautiful view, the hotel opened last year but the interior feels old, not new, and the room's furnishings are only at a 4-star level. The wall paint is peeling in places due to poor finishing, giving a feeling that it's not worth the 5-star rating. However, we have a two-bedroom suite with a spacious balcony surrounding the room, which makes up for it. It seems like the finishing work was done hastily, and staff should pay more attention to cleaning. When I entered the kitchen area, it had a very unpleasant smell; I eventually found that the base of the kettle had a foul odor, likely because previous guests left food stuck to it, and the staff didn't clean it properly afterward. 

The hotel staff is very enthusiastic; when I asked a man in a yellow shirt if I could borrow a cart to carry my luggage, he asked my room number and then even came up to my room to bring the luggage down for me and loaded it into the car. 

Breakfast is good. The hotel focuses on the young family segment, so having many family rooms and an indoor pool would be better for families with small children.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Suite, 2 Bedrooms, with Balcony and Ocean View (Family)

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Location clean
sample_comments.negatives: Unfinished swimming pool and very noisy at night

sample_comments.title: Good enough
sample_comments.text:
Good enough for bed & breakfast, but still has long way to go to become top choice in My Khe area..

Location is good as it's just across the beach with many eateries & spa around, the 2-bedroom room is spacious & adequate for my family of 5 with a nice view of the sea, the breakfast has good variety and quality for us to eat 4 days in a row, and the free pick up is also very convenient.

The staff is hit and miss - some are polite & helpful (shout out to Phuong) while many others are just unhelpful. They are also clearly still struggling to operate with me & few other people having to wait >10mins at reception. It took almost 30mins for me to just check in. Their daily housekeeping is also very basic and miss out many things.
sample_comments.room_type: Room, Multiple Beds

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: The location, the staff, the restaurant, the rooms clean and spacious
sample_comments.negatives: The rooms are perfect. I tried 2 of them, but the noise from outside is too much I can hear everything on the street

sample_comments.title: Good location but noisy
sample_comments.text:
Location is good for activities and fun but if you like peaceful and quiet, this hotel is not for you. 
Big buses come every day, could of tourists. The beach have things going on, music all night ( Saturday night) 
Sunday morning (5am.) speaker going on with women noisy voice. 
It might not be every weekend, I'm not sure. 
The room nice and clean with comfortable bed. We booked ocean view but got a room on the side of the hotel only half of ocean view.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Studio, 1 King Bed, with Balcony and Ocean View

sample_comments.title: We were very pleased with our stay at Wyndham, it made our first visit to Vietnam very special.
sample_comments.positives: The breakfast was wonderful and plentiful with a comfortable setting and great views from that location and very friendly staff. Our room was great, plenty of room and well laid out. The views from our corner rooms were really nice and we liked the fact that we were located on the 6th floor. The balcony was substantial, would have been a bonus to have more chairs out there but what we had was acceptable.
sample_comments.negatives: The only real issues were minor. With 5 family members sharing the accommodation it would have been nice if the shared bathroom was lockable. Found a wristwatch in the room (previous tenant) on the top shelf of family room, was surprised that it was missed by house keeping.

sample_comments.title: Convenient location but has noise issues.
sample_comments.text: Due to the previous booking issue, I found this hotel on the same day and rebooked. Both Agoda and the hotel were able to quickly process and confirm the order, which was very commendable. The hotel is located directly across from the beach, and it's very convenient to just cross the road. However, this also leads to noise problems at night from the beach party's loudspeakers, so a room with a view of the city might be better. The hotel does not have an infinity pool, but it is big enough and there is space to lie down and quietly watch the sea. The breakfast options are varied, and the rice noodles have slight changes every day. I hope that in the future, they can find a good balance for the noise issues, as this hotel has no other complaints. Overall, it is still worth recommending!
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Studio, 1 King Bed, with Balcony and Partial Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Would stay on this property again but not during peak travel season
sample_comments.positives: Good location, nicely equipped facilities, great staffs
sample_comments.negatives: Too noise from construction and music from the street

sample_comments.title: Staff friendly and helpful, great location, good food breakfast buffet. Nice seating area at pool, very nice waiting are
sample_comments.positives:
Greeted by staff on arrival, friendly, and professional.Excellent location, walk across street to beach. Very well lit at night.
Room views of pool & ocean. Large balcony, with table & chairs. Clean, comfy bed.
Buffet breakfast excellent with many varieties of cold and cooked foods.
sample_comments.negatives: No concierge service. No microwave in room.

sample_comments.title: Very good

There is an inconvenience of having to squint and check every time I use the case for slippers and toiletries (shampoo, conditioner, shower foam) since they all look the same. Breakfast is good!

The staff were great. The room, not so much. 
The sofa was like concrete. Uncomfortable to sit on. 
The bed was great. 
The bathroom is terribly designed. A shower hose, but no place to hang it to take a shower. No shower curtain, so water everywhere. Poorly designed room.

sample_comments.title: Overall excellent and enjoyable rrip
sample_comments.positives: Good location. Clean and huge rooms. Staff were polite and helpful
sample_comments.negatives: I would prefer a proper shower area rather than to shower in the bath tub

sample_comments.title: Good value for the price.
sample_comments.text:
It was great that the bedroom space was separated since there are two babies, and having a sofa bed in the living room made it perfect for the kids to play. Feeding the baby in the room was very inconvenient, but it was nice that they provided a high chair and the baby crib was spacious. 
The breakfast wasn't particularly varied or delicious, but it was okay for a simple meal in the morning. 
The bathroom had a separate shower and bathtub, but the toilet wasn't separate, and the floor is tiled, so it can be slippery when wet, so you need to be careful, especially if you have kids or babies.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you very much for sharing your detailed feedback with us. We are pleased to know that you found our accommodation to be good value for money and suitable for your family, especially with the separated bedroom and living area, as well as the sofa bed that allowed your children to play comfortably. We are also glad that the baby amenities, including the high chair and baby cot, were helpful during your stay.

At the same time, we appreciate your honest comments regarding the breakfast selection and the bathroom layout. Your remarks about the floor being slippery when wet are particularly valuable, and we thank you for highlighting this important safety concern for families with young children. Your feedback has been noted and shared with the relevant teams for further consideration and improvement.

We truly appreciate you choosing Wyndham Soleil Danang and taking the time to provide such constructive feedback. We hope to welcome you and your family back for an e
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Suite, 1 Bedroom, with Balcony and City View (Family)

sample_comments.title: Staff provide outstanding customer service. Big thank you to a leader of the reception Miss Vivian.
sample_comments.positives: New property clean unfortunate kitchen is not working. You cannot cook so I believe this is a waste of space. It's a full kitchen. You only can use refrigerator. that's a big issue for a family suites.
sample_comments.negatives: Nice bed gorgeous view. I had a family room on the 30th floor.

sample_comments.title: New and get experience
sample_comments.text:
Our stay at Wyndham Soleil Danang was a mixed experience. We were a little disappointed to find that the building did not appear as new as advertised. Although it was indicated as newly built in 2025, the exterior walls looked quite dirty, which affected our first impression.

On a positive note, the staff were friendly, approachable, and always willing to help. The room itself was clean, comfortable, and well-equipped with all necessary toiletries, which we appreciated.

One area for improvement would be the location of the smoking area, which is very close to the hotel entrance. Each time the doors opened, the smell of smoke was noticeable and uncomfortable.

Overall, while the service and room cleanliness were commendable, some improvements to the building's upkeep and smoking area placement would greatly enhance the guest experience.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback with us. We sincerely regret to learn that your stay did not meet your expectations and that you chose to depart earlier than planned due to the issues you experienced.

While we are pleased to know that you appreciated our breakfast selection, the initial service from our team, and the effectiveness of the air conditioning, we are truly sorry for the shortcomings related to the room size, in-room facilities, maintenance issues, pool temperature, and the construction activities in and around the pool area. We also apologize for the confusion regarding the kitchen facilities and for the inconvenience caused by non-functioning lights and items due to missing batteries.

Your comments have been shared with our management and relevant departments for immediate review and corrective action. We value your honest feedback, as it helps us identify areas that require urgent improvement to enhance the overall guest
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Studio, 1 King Bed, with Balcony and Ocean View

sample_comments.title: i will probably choose whyndham again when i come back yo vietnam.
sample_comments.positives: i like everything from property location and staff
sample_comments.negatives: excellent service and location except for housekeeping.

sample_comments.title: Not up to standard
sample_comments.text:
Overall, i would rate it 3.5/5. 

Will start with good pointers:
1. Staffs at recep were very welcoming and friendly. Speaks good and clear english. 

2. Bfast staff ensures that we have someting to eat. They know their menu well and recommends which that doesn't have pork, we are muslims. Kudos!

3. We sent for laundry and the staffs confirms w us first the qty before proceeding to wash. Just to ensure we are aware on qty.

4. Arranged pickup service from /to airport. Its their own staff whom drove us, felt safe . 

5. We took the Deluxe Studio, kinda direct facing but only a portion of it. If u willing to splurge a lil, go foor the 2 bedroom! HUGE AND LONG balcony, huge rooms w bathtub and overlooking the vast sea. Nice!

6. There's minimart nearby, quite cheap also. 2-3 mins walk only

Now the improvements part:
Just felt its not up to the 5 star hotel standard.

1.Room curtains have some burnt marks, the coffee table have stains and balcony door have lots fingerprints. 

2.As they are newly built, some lifts is still not in service hence those who got a room that is far from lift, will have to walk abit.

3. Bfast staff at the recep might need to be mindful of their words. We quoted our room number thrice but she misheard and corrected us, ours is 12xxxx instead of 12yyy. We are just not in the mood so we let it slide. So yeah, some guest may not like it.

4. For the price paid, we do expect a seamless service. However, I believe Wyndham Soleil will be better. It has great potential
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ayu,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a detailed review of your stay. We are pleased to hear that you appreciated our welcoming team, the attentive breakfast service, laundry handling, and safe airport transfer arrangements. It's also wonderful to know you enjoyed the spacious layout and view of your room.

We truly value your constructive feedback regarding room condition, lift service, and communication at breakfast. Please rest assured that your comments have been shared with the relevant departments to further enhance our service quality and guest experience.

Your recognition of our potential means a lot to us, and we are committed to living up to the 5-star standards you rightfully expect. We hope to have another opportunity to welcome you back for an improved and seamless stay.

Sincerely,
Wyndham Soleil Danang

The breakfast is quite good. The room is a bit cramped; I booked a 39m2 room but it feels more like 28m2, quite tight. The hotel does not have an indoor pool, so I'm not very fond of it.

sample_comments.title: An excellent and relaxing stay, a modern hotel I looked forward to returning to each day
sample_comments.positives: Overall so happy with our stay. The breakfast choices exceeded our expectations, with the variety of cuisine options, and as a bonus, the food was actually tasty. The location is excellent, smack at the center of My Khe beach, making it equally convenient to both the beachfront and nearby city establishments. I was reading the reviews here and noticed that the negative reviews were mainly attributed to the noise from the beach front establishments. While it does get quite loud during prime time (around 7-9 PM), the volume noticeably drops by around 10 PM, so it didn't end up bothering us at all. I'd also like to commend most of the staff we interacted with. The restaurant staff, bellhops, and housekeeping team were all very friendly and accommodating throughout our stay.
sample_comments.negatives:
I was fortunate to have my extended family join me on this trip. There were about eight of us in total, and we booked four rooms. While I personally enjoyed the room's configuration and space, one of the rooms assigned to my relatives unfortunately had several issues: the balcony door wasn't locking properly, the shower curtain had visible mold, and the main door also had a problem that required someone from maintenance to come and fix it. I do appreciate that the hotel offered to transfer them to another room after we reported these concerns, though it does make me wonder how all of these issues in a single room went unnoticed prior to check-in. 

The concierge team was polite, though there is room for improvement. They seemed a bit less confident when interacting with foreign guests, and as frontliners for guest concerns, it would help if guests felt more at ease approaching them. The checkout process was also quite chaotic, with no clear organization or queue, and some guests were cutting in line. At one point someone interrupted while I was checking out and was assisted ahead of me, likely because they were speaking in the local language. It was a bit frustrating, especially since our shuttle was already waiting.

sample_comments.title: Good except for a few
sample_comments.text: Location is perfect for the new year countdown as it is just across our hotel. Since the hotel is fairly new, cleanliness was really good. There was a kitchen- induction cooker with range hood dish rack a big refrigerator but maybe it will be better if there are a few plates and utensils maybe a pan or 2 for the kitchen to be used. Or maybe add a microwave. Only disappointment? We left early for a tour and put the make up room sign by our door. But when we came back mid afternoon, our room was still not cleaned. I know it was day before new years and hotel is at its peak but still we were out almost the whole day and came back disappointed. Hope this will improve

Wyndham Soleil Danang

sample_comments.title: Excellent location, affordability, and staff.
sample_comments.positives: Excelkent location right in front of My khe beach.The staff were very friendly and helpful. I enjoyed the diverse guest demographics.
sample_comments.negatives: Everything was great!!

sample_comments.title: Great location, but..
sample_comments.text:
Pros: Hotel was right across the beach making it very convenient. Since we were traveling with kids, the kids club was a life saver. It's open from 9am to 5.30pm. The family suite is really a 2BR apartment complete with a living room, dining room and kitchen. However there were no pots, pans, plates or utensils provided. The hotel also provides complimentary airport transfer to and from Danang international airport. We utilized it for our return trip. The hotel staff deserve praise for greeting everyone with a smile despite the high volume of guests they were receiving.

Cons: The common toilet was extremely slippery and dangerous for elderly and children. It would be helpful to have a rubber mat provided. The sound proofing was also rather poor. Our sleep was disrupted by loud music from beach parties / DJs till around 10.30pm. It was challenging to put the children to sleep with the noise. While the free airport transfer was appreciated, the air conditioning was not working at all. It was torturous 15min ride to the airport. The elderly and children were sweating buckets in the summer heat and had to cool themselves down with wet wipes during the ride.

Overall: the layout of the room worked for our family but we'd likely not come back here as sleep is rather important and the noise was a bit too much for us.
sample_comments.room_type: Family Suite, 2 Bedrooms, with Balcony and Ocean View

The ,,city,, is ,,5 euro,, away from the hotel (by Grab). the sand was amaizing. the room was very big and clean, beds were very good. we found a platter with sweets from the hotel - thanks :) nice view of the beach from the balcony. the breakfast was really good - ,,tons,, of food!! very friendly staff, willing to help in any matter

sample_comments.title: Worth the money for the Soft Opening phase.
sample_comments.text:
The following feedback is a personal experience during the Soft Opening on October 10, 2025, of the hotel:

a) Positive points: All equipment is new and clean. Staff are friendly. Breakfast is tasty and has a variety of dishes.
b) Areas for improvement:
- The breakfast restaurant staff do not use deodorizing water to clean tables; the tablecloths have an unpleasant odor, leaving an uncomfortable smell after cleaning.
- The Daikin air conditioning in the room is set up in a strange European language instead of common English, making it difficult to adjust the air conditioning. Assistance had to be called from the help desk.
- The toiletries in the toilet (toothbrush, etc.) are ordinary and not high-end.
- The key staff mixed up room ***, instead of room ***, which wasted time.
- The decoration of paintings, flowers, and scents in the hotel has not received attention and investment, creating a cold and simple atmosphere.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Khac,

Thank you very much for sharing your detailed feedback following your stay during our soft opening phase. We truly appreciate your understanding and support as we continue to refine our services and facilities.

We are pleased to know you enjoyed our new and clean facilities, the friendly service from our team, and the variety and quality of our breakfast. At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the shortcomings you encountered --- particularly with the cleaning process at breakfast, air conditioner language settings, and the key delivery mix-up. Your comments regarding the toiletries and interior ambiance are also well noted and have been shared with the respective departments for improvement.

Your insights are invaluable in helping us enhance the guest experience as we move toward full operation. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again for a more seamless and enjoyable stay.

Sincerely,
Wyndham Soleil Danang
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Studio, 2 Single Beds, with Balcony and Ocean View

sample_comments.title: A Wonderful Stay Made Perfect by Exceptional Service
sample_comments.text:
Our family had a fantastic experience at this beautiful, new hotel. The 2-bedroom ocean view apartment was spacious and modern, and both beds were very comfortable. The location across from the beach is ideal, and the pool and gym are excellent.

The service truly exceeded all expectations. For my son's birthday, the team decorated the room and presented him with a cake, creating a core memory for our little one and for us.

A fair point for light sleepers: while the beach bar music ends by 10-11 pm, the noise from portable karaoke machines used by locals on the beach can go on very late, even into the morning. This is a public nuisance, not a fault of the hotel. My family wasn't bothered, but I was losing sleep. The hotel manager, however, was a hero. He kindly and proactively offered us a room change, which completely resolved the issue. Their willingness to solve a problem that wasn't even their fault shows a real commitment to guest comfort.

Because of this amazing service, we highly recommend this hotel and will be back without hesitation.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mrs. Josephine,

Thank you very much for your wonderful and detailed review. We are truly delighted to hear that you and your family had such a memorable stay with us, and that our spacious apartment, convenient location, and facilities met your expectations.

It is heartwarming to know that our team could make your son's birthday celebration special and that our manager's proactive support helped ensure your continued comfort. Your kind words are the greatest motivation for us to keep delivering genuine hospitality.

We appreciate your understanding regarding the beachside noise --- as you noted, it is beyond the hotel's control, but we are glad the situation was resolved smoothly.

We look forward to welcoming you and your family back for another exceptional stay in the near future.

Sincerely,
Wyndham Soleil Danang
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Suite, 2 Bedrooms, with Balcony and Ocean View (Family)

sample_comments.title: The inconvenience of the Agoda app.
sample_comments.text: On one booking, it is not possible to book different types of rooms, such as a single room and a double room. After asking many times, the staff replied that we have to book separately, and this way, each family member might be on a different floor. How can we take care of elderly and young children? Therefore, please consider this matter carefully. Best regards.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Thinh,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We are glad that you chose Wyndham Soleil Danang for your family stay.

We sincerely regret the inconvenience caused by the booking system limitation when reserving different room types under one booking. We understand how important it is for families to stay close together, and we will share your comments with Agoda to help improve the process. Meanwhile, our team will always do our best to arrange nearby rooms whenever possible.

We truly appreciate your input and hope to welcome you and your family again for a more seamless experience.

Sincerely,
Wyndham Soleil Danang

sample_comments.title: Gestion administrative décevante
sample_comments.positives: L'établissement est bien situé, propre. Petit dej très bien.
sample_comments.negatives:
Lors de notre Check in, on nous a demandé un déposit à hauteur du nombre de nuit passées. Soit 3M VDN, alors que les conditions générales de vente ne mentionnent pas ce point. L'établissement n'aurait donc pas dû nous prélever. 
De plus cette somme a été prélevée deux fois, par erreur. Nous avons été remboursés du 1er déposit lors du Check out mais pas du second. 
Cela fait plus de 10 jours que nous sommes partis de l'hôtel et en attente du remboursement. L'établissement me dit sans cesse qu il reviendra vers moi mais rien n'est réglé.
Faites donc attention lors du Check in à ne pas payer ce déposit puisqu'il n'est notifié nulle part en tous cas via Booking.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: I recently stayed at the Wyndham Soleil Danang for 3 nights and thoroughly enjoyed the experience. The room was very specious and well appointed. The breakfast buffet had a good selection and was very tasty though it could get busy at peak times. The pool deck was very pleasant and the swimming pool was very long though not too wide. The hotel is in a great location with only a short walk across the promenade road to the excellent My Khe beach. Most of the attractions within the city including the airport are only a short taxi ride away.

sample_comments.negatives: Wir haben ein Zimmer für 4 Personen gebucht. Bei Ankunft stellten wir dann fest, dass wir offenbar in einem Bett schlafen sollten. Nach meiner Beschwerde wurde uns dann für einen satten Aufschlag die Aufbettung angeboten. Das ist frech, zumal die Mitarbeiter an der Rezeption maximal planlos waren. Das zog sich dann über die gesamte Zeit, wir hatten im Voraus die zweiteilige Silvesterparty gebucht, wo wir erst nach mehrmaligem Nachfragen die Bestätigung erhalten haben, dass wir registriert waren. Die Abrechnung stimmte erst nach mehrfacher Korrektur. Das Hotel wirbt mit Strandlage... Aber Handtücher dürfen nicht aus dem Hotel verwendet werden. Und so weiter, und so weiter. Wir kommen sicher nicht wieder

sample_comments.title: Einmal ja, zweites Mal nein
sample_comments.positives: Die Unterkunft war wie auf den Bildern, das Frühstück war sehr vielfältig. In der Umgebung gab es einige Restaurants und Supermärkte.
sample_comments.negatives: Zu viele Gäste die sich unverschämt aufführen und dennoch bevorzugt behandelt werden. Zigaretten werden vom Balkon an den Pool Bereich geworfen. Landete dann auf meiner Liege. Es werden „Meetings" vor der Saftbar abgehalten und die Behälter mit Saft werden schon vor Ort leer getrunken, sowie die Gläser überall verteilt. Vor dem Obst das gleiche, der Bereich wird belagert und das Obst im stehen vor Ort gegessen sodass andere Gäste sich gestört fühlen, zumal man gar nicht an das Obst ran kommt weil diese Menschen mit den Händen das Obst essen. Man hat eher Pauschalreisenfeelings bei all den Osteuropäischen und Südasiatischen Gästen, die sich nicht zu benehmen wissen. Mit dem eigentlichen vietnamesischen Feeling hat das nichts zu tun, die Umgebung ist „Little Miami" viele Hotel-Bunker und Großstadt Vibes mit Partys. Wer sowas mag, ist genau richtig, uns hat dieser Vibe nicht gefallen. Die Sauberkeit des Hotels allgemein war in Ordnung, die Flure waren oft nicht so passabel und wir hatten Probleme mit der Eingangstür unseres Zimmers. Das mag vielleicht auf hohem Niveau gemeckert sein, aber ein gutes Zimmer ist für einen schönen Urlaub oft nicht ausreichend.

sample_comments.title: Hotel in front of a beach
sample_comments.text: Had a pleasant stay at Wyndham Soleil Da Nang. The airport shuttle schedule was on time. The location is excellent, right in front of a beautiful beach. The room was clean, new, and spacious. We even got an upgraded room! Thanks, Wyndham! We enjoyed our stay.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Studio, 1 King Bed, with Balcony and City View

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives:
Einzelne Mitarbeitende waren außergewöhnlich freundlich und positiv hervorzuheben, besonders der Security am Konferenzbereich, der Bellboy vor der Rezeption sowie ein Koch beim Frühstücksbuffet.
Die Lage ist grundsätzlich gut und das Hotel wirkt auf den ersten Blick modern.
sample_comments.negatives:
Kein echtes 5-Sterne-Niveau
Viele Details wirken unausgereift. Das Hotel scheint konzeptionell nicht ganz zu wissen, was es sein möchte.

Zimmer & Ausstattung
Große Küche im Zimmer, die nicht genutzt werden darf
Kein sinnvoller Platz, um einen Koffer zu öffnen
Balkon relativ klein, zusätzlich durch einen großen technischen Kasten stark eingeschränkt

Frühstück & Restaurant
Frühstück war mehrfach gegen 06:15 Uhr noch nicht fertig aufgebaut (Start um 6:00)
Buffet oft schlecht organisiert, zu wenige Zangen
Für Allergiker problematisch: gleiche Zange für Mango und anderes Obst
Personal beim Frühstück sehr unaufmerksam, Probleme an Kaffeemaschinen wurden nicht proaktiv gelöst
Atmosphäre eher Kantine als 5-Sterne-Restaurant
Tische teilweise nicht abgeräumt oder bereits verschmutzt (dreckige Platzsets bevor jemand da war)

Service
Hilfe bei einer Restaurantreservierung wurde an der Rezeption unfreundlich bzw. wenig lösungsorientiert abgelehnt

Sauberkeit
Aufzüge morgens und nachmittags häufig sandig, nass und teilweise mit Zigarettenstummeln
Gerade zu Peakzeiten fehlte sichtbare Reinigung

Poolbereich
Sehr wenige Liegen (ca. 12)
Pool ab ca. 13 Uhr komplett im Schatten
Vormittags kaum Schattenplätze (nur zwei Sonnenschirme)

Nachhaltigkeit
Kommunikation zur „Green Policy" passt nicht zur Realität: Handtücher wurden trotz Aufhängen täglich gewechselt.

Everyone stepped up and assisted including moving my things while I was at the hospital. The staff and other personnel were always friendly and willing to assist. I would not hesitate to stay again when I return.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Kelvin,

Thank you very much for your kind feedback and for choosing to stay at Wyndham Soleil Danang.

We are truly delighted to know that you found your stay to be money well spent and that our team was able to support you during your time of need. It is especially rewarding to hear that our staff could assist you with your room arrangement, transportation, and personal belongings while you were at the hospital. Your appreciation means a great deal to our entire team.

We will gladly share your kind words with all staff members as encouragement for their continued dedication to guest care.

We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to Danang.

Kind regards,
Wyndham Soleil Danang

sample_comments.title: Home away from home
sample_comments.text:
We are really glad we chose Wyndham Soleil for our Da Nang stay. You know how a hotel can make or break your holiday? This hotel made ours. One can't possibly enjoy their vacation if they know they're going home to a hotel that doesn't really meet their standards. We were booked in a 2-bedroom family suite and view to My Khe Beach was just amazing. Our room was cleaned everyday; towels, water and toiletries were replenished everyday too. I was a bit worried about the outside noise complaints in other reviews but it wasn't that bad at all. I'm a light sleeper and it wasn't that loud to begin with. Plus it stopped at some point (not too late either).
Brekky spread was divine. - Western and Asian cuisine, yum! I also indulged myself with the different desserts and rambutan and jujubes every time I could :-) 
The staff at Wyndham Soleil is very helpful, respectful, friendly and professional. I would like to commend a young man at reception. Am not sure of his position as he helped us with our luggage too. His name is Tien. My family and I got there at lunchtime from Hoi An. We were tired and the place was packed. Tien came up to me and asked for my booking reference. He checked my booking on the computer and right away we were able to leave our luggages and proceed to Vincom plaza to have lunch. We came back at check-in time and he helped us with our luggages up to our room. His efficiency is impressive. He also recommended us a driver to take us to Ba Na Hills at a good price. 
Would also like to commend Tai, one of the guest relations officers. She organised a surprise birthday cake for my husband. At brekky time on my husband's birthday, she approached me to confirm. Very thankful as I nearly forgot. I asked if they could sing for my husband but she said they might not be able to as the floor was packed. I was fine with it but she was able to make it happen. I was really glad. My kids and I started to sing and they sang with us. The guys at the next table did too. 
We only have the best memories of our Vietnam trip and Wyndham Soleil is part of that. If you are able to book a room here, do so. Don't hesitate. It isn't the cheapest but you get more value for your buck in the end. 
Thank you Wyndham Soleil. Kudos and all the best to everyone working there!
sample_comments.room_type: Family Suite, 2 Bedrooms, with Balcony and Ocean View

Overall good.

But some areas may need improvement:
The cold and hot water is not stable.
Refilling shampoo, shower gel, and conditioner is not enough for a family of 5, and sometimes they forget to give you new towels. Don't worry, the old ones are taken away.

Not all staff are professional in English, but they are still willing to communicate with you through a translator.

I stayed here for the month and was very happy with my stay. Rooms were super comfortable, staff was amazing, housekeeping was exceptional and the views from the balcony are great! Nice hot water, cold AC and strong WiFi. Great location close to everything! Can't wait to come back!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Rodolfo,

Thank you so much for your outstanding review. We are truly delighted to hear that you enjoyed your long stay with us, from the comfort of the rooms and housekeeping service to the views, amenities, and our staff's hospitality.

Your kind words are a great motivation for our team, and we are so pleased that you consider our property excellent for your stay in Da Nang. We look forward to welcoming you back very soon!

Sincerely,
Wyndham Soleil Danang
